title: Mo' Milk
description: A mod that adds more milk variations and other fun tweaks.
body:
It's time to drink some milk with the Mo' Milk mod! With various new milk related items plus some other fun surprises you'll have a sluping fun time! **Features** **Brand New Milk Items**
From Chocolate Milk which cures all negative effects to Milk Bottles which cures the last effect received there are tons of new milk items all with unique effects!
All Milk Items
  • Milk Bottle
    •       Removes the last status effect received
  • Milk Arrow
    •       Removes all status effects when hit
  • Chocolate Milk Bucket
    •       Removes all negative status effects
  • Chocolate Milk Bottle
    •       Removes the last negative status effect received
  • Chocolate Milk Arrow
    •       Removes all negative status effect when hit
  • Hot Chocolate
    •       Removes all neutral status effects
  • Hot Chocolate Bottle
    •       Removes the last neutral status effect received
  • Hot Chocolate Arrow
    •       Removes all neutral status effect when hit
  • Spoiled Milk Bucket
    •       Removes all positive status effects
  • Spoiled Milk Bottle
    •       Removes the last positive status effect received
  • Spoiled Milk Arrow
    •       Removes all positive status effects when hit
  • Hog Milk Bucket
    •       Extinguishes the player
  • Hog Milk Bottle
    •       Decrease the burn time when on fire
  • Hog Milk Arrow
    •       Removes fire from entities when hit
  • Spoiled Hog Milk Bucket
    •       Ignites the player or increase the burn time if already on fire
  • Spoiled Hog Milk Bottle
    •       Increases the burn time when on fire
  • Spoiled Hog Milk Arrow
    •       Ignites the player or increase the burn time if already on fire when hit
  • Cereal
    •       Restores all hunger points
  • Cereal Bottle
    •       Restores half the hunger points
  • Cereal Arrow
    •       Restores all hunger points when hit
  • Spoiled Cereal
    •       Removes all hunger points
  • Spoiled Cereal Bottle
    •       Removes half the hunger points
  • Spoiled Cereal Arrow
    •       Removes all hunger points when hit
  • Suspicious Milk
    •       Removes a certain effect based on the flower used to craft it
  • Congealed Milk Blocks
    •       Crafted with 4 of any milk buckets
    •       Has a smaller collision box then normal but still looks like a full block
  • Edible Congealed Milk Blocks
    •       Congealed Cereal, Spoiled Cereal & Hot Chocolate Blocks can be eaten
    •       Congealed Hot Chocolate burns entities when standing on it
**Salt**
Mine some Salt to make brand new Salt Blocks, Foods & Effects!
All Salt Items
  • Salt Ore
    •       Generates in coastal, ocean & planes biomes
    •       Comes in deepslate varient
  • Salt
    •       Can be eaten to receive the new Drowning effect
    •       Can be brewed into Potions of Drowning
    •       Can be placed as an invisible salt layer that hurts amphibious mobs & Slimes
  • Floating Salt
    •       Can be placed as an invisible salt layer just like Salt but isn't affected by gravity
    •       Can be brewed into Potions of the Phantom Master
  • Rejuvenating Salt
    •       Can be placed as an invisible salt layer just like Salt but doesn't damage mobs
    •       Can be brewed into Potions of the Melon Master
  • Glowing Salt
    •       Can be placed as an invisible salt layer just like Salt but doesn't damage mobs & emits light
    •       Can be brewed into Potions of the Glowing Master
  • Salt Block
    •       Comes in 3 stages, small, medium & large
    •       Increases size when waterlogged
    •       The bigger the size the more salt you can craft it back into
  • Salt Lamps
    •       Crafted with any torch and any salt block
    •       Provides different light levels based on the size and torch used to craft
    •       Redstone Salt Lamps provide different Redstone outputs based on the size
  • Salt Stairs, Slabs & Walls
    •       Crafted with large salt blocks
    •       Is affected by gravity
    •       Can be dispensed from dispensers
**Cheese** - A brand new placeable food made with Salt & Milk! - The more it ages the more hunger you get back! **Brine Your Blocks** - Use Salt to brine your Coral & Eyeblossoms to prevent them from updating - De-Brine your blocks with Apple Cider to have them go back to normal! **New Effects!**
Brand new effects from drowning to oxygen which will make traversing underwater easier or harder
New Effect
  • Drowning
    •       Brewed with Salt
    •       Makes an entities oxygen deplete faster when underwater
  • Oxygen
    •       Brewed with a potion of Drowing and a Fermented Spider Eye
    •       Depletes an entities oxygen slower
**And More!**
There's many more changes and features to improve the vanilla gameplay experience
Other Features
  • Cinnamon Sticks
    •       Obtained from stripping overworld logs
    •       Can be eaten for some quick hunger points
    •       Can be used to craft stripped logs/wood back into their unstripped variants
    •       Can be crafted into bales
  • Hyphae Sticks
    •       Obtained from stripping nether stems
    •       Can be eaten for some quick hunger points
    •       Can be used to craft stripped stems/hyphae back into their unstripped variants
    •       Can be crafted into bales
  • Apple Cider
    •       Made with Cinnamon, Sugar, Apple & Glass Bottle
    •       Can be drank for some hunger
    •       Used to craft Cheese & de-brine blocks
  • Wrapped Bamboo
    •       A Bamboo block with the side texture on all sides
    •       Can be stripped
  • Bamboo Changes
    •       A Bamboo Blocks have a chance of driopping bamboo when stripped
    •       Can be used to unstrip bamboo blocks
  • Dispensers Changes
    •       Can be used to milk Cows, Goats, Mooshrooms, Zoglins & Hoglins
    •       Dispenses gravity affected blocks as blocks instead of items
  • New Suspicious Stews
    •       All flowers can be used to make suspicious stews
  • Hoglin/Zoglin Changes
    •       Can be milked for Hog/Spoiled Hog Milk Buckets & Bottles
